name: Shelter
short_description: Shelter is a pixel style casual game that requires assistance in building shelters for survivors to survive in air raids.There are various types of mechanisms and facilities of different sizes that can be placed.
detailed_description:
Shelter is a pixel style casual game that requires assistance in building shelters for survivors to survive in air raids.

There are various types of mechanisms and facilities of different sizes that can be placed.

Each level requires the use of different mechanisms and objectives.

Physical simulation can affect the different performances of mechanisms in levels.

Contains 40+levels.
about_the_game:
Shelter is a pixel style casual game that requires assistance in building shelters for survivors to survive in air raids.

There are various types of mechanisms and facilities of different sizes that can be placed.

Each level requires the use of different mechanisms and objectives.

Physical simulation can affect the different performances of mechanisms in levels.

Contains 40+levels.
supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Polish, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean
